records.title: Benchmark operator runs Phase 1 on a source-heavy target
records.description: A benchmark operator starts a phased run on a target that may have sparse documentation. The runner inspects available docs, reports the real evidence posture, and writes an exploration artifact that later phases can trust.
steps: Start a phased run from the repo root or an installed target.
Inspect the effective documentation inputs visible to Phase 1.
Proceed into exploration using the strongest evidence actually available.

records.title: Maintainer self-audits QPB at the repo root
records.description: A QPB maintainer runs the playbook directly against the repository root and expects the self-audit to see the same effective documentation surface that a harness-installed benchmark target would expose.
steps: Run the playbook against the repository root.
Read the live skill plus curated bootstrap context.
Compare the resulting evidence posture with the harness-installed model.

records.title: Later phases consume a generated exploration artifact
records.description: A later-phase AI agent reads quality/EXPLORATION.md from disk, validates that it satisfies the written Phase 2 gate, and uses that stable artifact as the baseline for downstream files.
steps: Read quality/EXPLORATION.md from disk.
Validate the required headings and content shape.
Generate downstream artifacts from the validated baseline.

records.title: Maintainer classifies a target as Code, Skill, or Hybrid
records.description: A maintainer or automation path classifies the target repository and expects that classification to survive into live run metadata consumed by later tooling.
steps: Run the project classifier.
Persist the resulting classification into live run metadata.
Let downstream tooling reason from the persisted value.

records.title: Auditor relies on byte-verified citations on an installed target
records.description: An auditor or quality gate on an installed target re-runs deterministic excerpt extraction against a cited document and expects the installed package to retain the verifier dependency needed for byte-equality checks.
steps: Read the installed gate package from the target repo.
Re-run excerpt extraction against the cited document bytes.
Reject any mismatch between stored excerpt and fresh extraction.

records.title: Operator terminates a stuck run without collateral damage
records.description: A benchmark operator invokes cleanup after a stuck run and expects only the recorded workers for that run to be terminated.
steps: Invoke run cleanup.
Read the per-run PID records.
Terminate only the workers belonging to that run.

records.title: Installer or downstream agent reads either shipped skill entry point
records.description: An installer or downstream AI agent resolves the playbook through either the repo-root or installed skill path and expects both entry points to teach the same instructions.
steps: Resolve the skill through one supported path.
Resolve it again through the alternate supported path.
Compare the resulting instructions and version stamps.
